name: CFSC Checks Cashed 8th & Mitchell
description_short: CFSC Checks Cashed 8th & Mitchell offers check cashing without a bank account, plus money orders, bill pay, and money transfers at 801 W Historic Mitchell St in Milwaukee.
description_long:
CFSC Checks Cashed 8th & Mitchell is part of Community Financial Services, a multi-location check-cashing network operating across Milwaukee, Wisconsin. The 8th & Mitchell location serves the Historic Mitchell Street area and provides alternative financial services to unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to cash and money services without traditional banking requirements.

The location offers a comprehensive suite of financial services including check cashing (personal and business), money orders, electronic bill pay, money transfers worldwide, prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account), ATM access, foreign currency exchange (80+ countries), transit/MetroCard sales, tax refund check cashing, prepaid cellular services, phone resale via EcoATM, and automobile license services. Spanish-language services are available (Se Habla Español). The location operates extended hours, including Sunday service (8:30 am–3:00 pm) and weekday hours until 7:30–8:00 pm.

The 8th & Mitchell location distinguishes itself through its extended operating hours (including Sunday), diverse service mix beyond basic check cashing, and accessibility to multilingual customers. The company requires only a government-issued photo ID and basic personal information to cash checks—no bank account or credit check needed. The location is part of a larger CFSC network with multiple Milwaukee branches, providing geographic convenience and consistency.

This is a legitimate check-cashing and money services provider appropriate for unbanked consumers, gig workers, and those seeking quick cash access without banking fees. However, check-cashing fees are not disclosed on the website, and consumers should verify pricing before using services. The company does not offer credit products, lending, or credit-building tools—it is purely a transactional money services business.
address: 801 W Historic Mitchell St, Milwaukee, WI 53204

pros: No bank account required to cash checks—only photo ID and personal information needed
Extended hours including Sunday (8:30 am–3:00 pm) and weekday evenings until 7:30–8:00 pm
Wide service menu: check cashing, money orders, bill pay, money transfers, prepaid debit cards, foreign currency exchange (80+ countries), and tax refund cashing
Bilingual customer service available (Se Habla Español)
Business check cashing available for self-employed and business owners
No credit check required for Yes! Debit Account (prepaid card)

cons: Check-cashing fees are not disclosed on the website; consumers must call (414) 875-6621 to learn pricing
No credit products, loans, or credit-building services—purely transactional money services
Limited to check cashing and alternative financial services; cannot replace a traditional bank account for savings, lending, or credit building
Services vary by location and must be verified by phone before visiting
No online check cashing or remote services—requires in-person visit to location
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate check cashing without a bank account
Self-employed workers and small business owners requiring business check cashing
Immigrant communities and Spanish-language speakers needing money transfers and foreign currency exchange
Consumers needing extended-hours money services, including weekend access
diagnosis: Best for unbanked consumers, gig workers, and small business owners who need quick check cashing and money services without a bank account. Main caveat: this is a transactional money services provider only—it offers no credit products, lending, or credit-building tools, and check-cashing fees are not publicly disclosed online.
